function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: GroupHom[T2, T0], x2: T2) { x1.hom(x2) ∈ x0 = subgroup_preimage_contains[T2, T0](x1, x0, x2) }[H, G](s, f, b)
function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: GroupHom[T2, T0], x2: T2) { x1.hom(x2) ∈ x0 = subgroup_preimage_contains[T2, T0](x1, x0, x2) }[H, G](s, f, a * b)
function[T0: Group](x0: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x0(x1) or not x0(x2) or x0(x1 * x2) } = closure_constraint[T0](x0) }[G](subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s))
let w0: G satisfy { exists(k0: G) { subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, w0) and subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, k0) and not subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, w0 * k0) } }
let w1: G satisfy { subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, w0) and subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, w1) and not subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, w0 * w1) }
let w2: G satisfy { subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, w0) and subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, w2) and not subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, w0 * w2) }
function(x0: G, x1: G) { not subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, x0) or not subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, x1) or subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, x0 * x1) }(w0, w2)
function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: GroupHom[T2, T0], x2: T2) { x1.hom(x2) ∈ x0 = subgroup_preimage_contains[T2, T0](x1, x0, x2) }[H, G](s, f, a)
function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: GroupHom[T2, T0], x2: T2) { x1.hom(x2) ∈ x0 = subgroup_preimage_contains[T2, T0](x1, x0, x2) }[H, G](s, f, a.inverse)
function[T0: Group](x0: T0 -> Bool) { forall(x1: T0) { not x0(x1) or x0(x1.inverse) } = inverse_constraint[T0](x0) }[G](subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s))
let w0: G satisfy { subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, w0) and not subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, w0.inverse) }
function(x0: G) { not subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, x0) or subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, x0.inverse) }(w0)

function[T0: Group](x0: T0 -> Bool) { (identity_constraint[T0](x0) and closure_constraint[T0](x0) and inverse_constraint[T0](x0)) = subgroup_constraint[T0](x0) }[G](subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s))
function[T0: Group](x0: T0 -> Bool) { not Subgroup.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: Subgroup[T0]) { Subgroup.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[Subgroup[T0]](k0) } }[G](subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s))

goal: subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, s).contains(a) = subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s, a)
proof: function[T0: Group, T1: Group](x0: GroupHom[T0, T1], x1: Subgroup[T1]) { Option.some[Subgroup[T0]](subgroup_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = Subgroup.new[T0](subgroup_preimage_contains[T0, T1](x0, x1)) }[G, H](f, s)

function[T0: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: T0 -> Bool, x2: T0) { Option.some[Subgroup[T0]](x0) != Subgroup.new[T0](x1) or x2 ∈ x0 = x1(x2) }[G](subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, s), subgroup_preimage_contains[G, H](f, s), a)
function[T0: Group, T2: Group](x0: Subgroup[T0], x1: GroupHom[T2, T0], x2: T2) { x1.hom(x2) ∈ x0 = subgroup_preimage_contains[T2, T0](x1, x0, x2) }[H, G](s, f, a)
function[T0: Group, T1: Group](x0: GroupHom[T0, T1]) { subgroup_preimage[T0, T1](x0, identity_subgroup[T1]) = group_hom_kernel[T0, T1](x0) }[G, H](f)
a ∈ subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, identity_subgroup[H])
not a ∈ subgroup_preimage[G, H](f, identity_subgroup[H])
not f.hom(a) ∈ identity_subgroup[H]
a ∈ group_hom_kernel[G, H](f) or f.hom(a) = H.1
not a ∈ group_hom_kernel[G, H](f) or f.hom(a) != H.1
a ∈ group_hom_kernel[G, H](f)
not a ∈ group_hom_kernel[G, H](f)
